description_long: This is a compact, rectangular, three-drawer cabinet with a dark, almost black, textured finish that gives it a slightly worn or industrial appearance. The front face features three evenly spaced drawers, each equipped with a simple, oval-shaped handle, likely made of metal or plastic, for easy access. The sides and back are plain, with the same dark, mottled surface texture, and no visible openings or decorative elements. The top surface is flat and solid, suitable for placing small items or equipment. The overall construction suggests it is made primarily of wood or engineered wood, possibly with a laminate or painted finish for durability. This type of cabinet is commonly found in urban environments such as offices, garages, workshops, or utility rooms.
description: A dark, three-drawer cabinet with a textured finish and oval handles, featuring a sturdy, boxy design suitable for urban interiors.
description_view_0: Front view showing three drawers with oval handles and a textured dark finish.
description_view_1: Side view displaying a plain, solid, dark-textured panel with no visible features.
description_view_2: Rear view with a featureless, dark-textured surface, matching the sides.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, identical to the other side, with a plain, dark-textured panel.
